info.description: Optional styling for a page section. Leave any field blank to use the theme default. Hex colours look like #FCE8EF (pink), #F5F3EF (cream), #231F20 (near-black), #6E3A5A (plum).

background_colour.description: Hex colour for the section background. Examples: #FCE8EF (soft pink), #F5F3EF (cream), #DCEFE6 (mint), #FFD07A (warm gold), #231F20 (near-black), #fff (white). Leave blank for white.

text_colour.description: Hex colour for the section text. Examples: #231F20 (near-black, default), #F5F3EF (cream — use on dark backgrounds), #6E3A5A (plum). Leave blank to keep dark text.

accent_colour.description: Hex colour for buttons, links, and small accents inside this section. Examples: #6E3A5A (plum), #F280AA (pink), #FAA21B (gold), #7BAFDD (blue), #5DCAA5 (mint). Leave blank for plum.

padding.description: How much vertical space this section takes. Tight = compact, Spacious = lots of breathing room.

alignment.description: Horizontal alignment for the text inside this section.

max_width.description: Width of the content inside this section. Narrow = ~700px (good for long reading), Medium = ~960px, Wide = ~1200px, Full = edge to edge.

background_image.description: Optional photo behind the text. Tip: pick text_colour = #F5F3EF (cream) when using a dark background image so the text stays readable.

background_image_overlay.description: Darkness of the dim layer over the background image (0 = none, 80 = very dark). Helps text stay readable on bright photos. Ignored if no background image.
